executionHistory.summary: Greenfield analysis complete. Created spec.md with problem statement, outcome contract, 7 goals, 9 requirements, 4 actors, 6 use cases, 10 business scenarios, 17 Gherkin acceptance scenarios, competitive analysis, and 5 improvement proposals. Covers enhanced share-sheet capture, forwarded message handling, conversation assembly algorithm, media group assembly, conversation artifact model, and configuration.

Created comprehensive design.md covering: architecture overview with 5 new files and 6 modified files, enhanced message routing order, ConversationAssembler with goroutine-safe in-memory buffer and inactivity-window algorithm, MediaGroupAssembler, enhanced share-sheet URL+context parsing, capture API extensions (ConversationPayload, MediaGroupPayload, ForwardMetaPayload), pipeline extensions for conversation content type, database migration 004_conversation_fields.sql, security model (allowlist on all paths, buffer isolation), configuration schema with validation, testing strategy covering unit/integration, and 5 alternatives considered.

Created scopes.md with 6 sequential scopes: (1) Enhanced Share-Sheet URL Capture, (2) Forwarded Message Detection & Single Capture, (3) Conversation Assembly Buffer, (4) Conversation Artifact Model & Pipeline, (5) Media Group Assembly, (6) Configuration, Routing Finalization & E2E. Each scope includes Gherkin scenarios mapped from spec, detailed test plans with scenario-to-test tracing, implementation plans, and Definition of Done checklists. Updated report.md and uservalidation.md templates.

Hardened planning artifacts: fixed 11 issues including governance violation (pre-checked uservalidation.md), missing duplicate URL scenario (SC-TSC04), missing /done command scenario (SC-TSC12a), missing conversation URL extraction (SC-TSC12b), forwarded-with-URL edge case (SC-TSC05a), malformed forwarded message (SC-TSC05b), out-of-order timestamps (SC-TSC12c), conversation validation rejection (SC-TSC13a), and confirmation format coverage across all scopes. Verdict: PARTIALLY_HARDENED (planning artifacts ready, no implementation exists yet).

notes: Telegram share-to-submit for capturing items via mobile share sheet, and sharing Telegram chat conversations into Smackerel.
